data.biography: Sarocha Chankimha, more commonly known by her nickname Freen, is a Thai actress, model, and singer. Chankimha began her acting career with the drama series So Fit and Secret Crush on You. She received greater recognition with her lead role in Gap: The Series as Sam. Her film roles include Uranus 2324.
data.name: Sarocha Chankimha
สโรชา จันทร์กิมฮะ
